name: Integration request
about: Suggest a public integration use case for SoMerch.
title: "[Integration]: "
---

## Integration area

What type of integration are you requesting?

- [ ] HRIS
- [ ] Procurement
- [ ] Accounting
- [ ] SSO
- [ ] Shipment tracking
- [ ] Inventory
- [ ] Approval workflow
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] Other

---

## System or tool

Name the system or tool, if applicable.

Example: Personio, BambooHR, Google Workspace, Microsoft Entra ID, NetSuite, Xero, QuickBooks, Slack, Microsoft Teams.

---

## Use case

Describe the workflow this integration should support.

Examples:

- employee onboarding pack trigger
- address collection
- approval workflow
- shipment status sync
- inventory export
- accounting export
- budget reporting

---

## Expected outcome

What should become easier after this integration exists?

---

## Public-safe confirmation

- [ ] This issue does not include private customer data.
- [ ] This issue does not include credentials, tokens, or secrets.
- [ ] This issue does not include personal shipping addresses.
